title: 软件安装 Core Software Installation
description: Install and configure the complete production stack — total cost: $0 for core tools

tasks.text: Download and install Pikafish engine (latest from pikafish.com)
Download and install 象棋巫师 Xiangqi Wizard
Connect Pikafish to Xiangqi Wizard via UCCI protocol
Configure OBS: Window Capture (board) + Audio Input (mic) + scenes
Install 剪映 (Jianying/CapCut) for short-form editing
Install or set up Premiere Pro / Vegas Pro for long-form editing
Install 天天象棋 on mobile for playing + AI review features
Set up xiangqi.com account for online analysis board
Test full recording pipeline: board → OBS → edit → export
